title: Create 3D-ify
description: This resourcepack changes many blocks of the Create Mod to be more 3D!
body:
### This resourcepack changes many blocks of the Create Mod to be more 3D!

Some blocks in Create are modelled really flat, while others are extremely detailed! This resourcepack tries to help with this by adding more detail to the less-detailed blocks.

## Flythrough of all the edited blocks!

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/9CvBs6S6Cgw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![Standard Create 3D blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/44d5cee4807bc481ebfbebe80b832796be70a324.png)
